overview: Lava Turtle is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Firedeep. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 200 HP, 25 physical damage, 70 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 8, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Bite at 250% ratio (625 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Magma Burst.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Magma Damage
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Magma Damage icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Bite (250% ratio)
strategies.description: Bite deals 625 damage at base (250% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Magma Burst
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Magma Burst. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Magma Burst

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
